debug_channels.name: uart_debug
debug_channels.path: USART3 through the ST-LINK VCP path

code_ownership.generated_code: may be regenerated by the authoritative tool
code_ownership.handwritten_code: should stay in handwritten project areas or user-code blocks

testability_boundary.unit_tests: must stay decoupled from HAL, TouchGFX runtime startup, and board dependencies
testability_boundary.system_tests: must verify observable board behavior through the real firmware
